infinite_gold.name: Infinite Gold
infinite_gold.description: Freeze faction treasury at a high value

fast_research.name: Fast Research
fast_research.description: Set active research timer to 1 turn

max_research_points.name: Max Research Points
max_research_points.description: Set research pool points to the maximum

instant_agent_training.name: Instant Agent Training
instant_agent_training.description: Complete agent training in a single turn

invisible_armies.name: Invisible Armies
invisible_armies.description: Force selected army visibility / fog immunity flag

god_mode.name: God Mode
god_mode.description: Keep selected unit health at maximum

infinite_morale.name: Infinite Morale
infinite_morale.description: Never allow the selected unit to rout

instant_reload.name: Instant Reload
instant_reload.description: Remove artillery and musket reload delay

range_boost.name: Range Boost
range_boost.description: Increase unit projectile or musket range

speed_boost.name: Speed Boost
speed_boost.description: Increase cavalry charge and movement speed

one_hit_kill.name: One-Hit Kill
one_hit_kill.description: Inject a damage multiplier write for massive damage

super_speed.name: Super Speed
super_speed.description: Inject a large movement speed value

instant_victory.name: Instant Victory
instant_victory.description: Force the auto-resolve victory result flag

max_public_order.name: Max Public Order
max_public_order.description: Set city public order to the maximum

agent_action_points.description: Selected agent action points on campaign map

agent_training_timer.description: Turns remaining for the selected agent training queue

army_visibility_flag.description: Selected army visibility / fog immunity flag
army_visibility_flag.notes: CampaignArmy -> Visibility state; 1 keeps the army hidden from fog checks.

artillery_reload_timer.description: Selected artillery reload timer in battle

attrition_rate.description: Selected army attrition rate on campaign map
attrition_rate.notes: CampaignArmy -> Attrition component. Freeze at 0.0 to prevent losses.

autoresolve_victory_flag.notes: AutoResolveManager -> ResultData -> Winner flag (1 = player victory).

charge_speed.description: Selected cavalry charge / movement speed modifier

movement_points.notes: Same CampaignManager base as treasury; different final offset.

treasury.notes: CampaignManager -> FactionData -> Treasury. Use calibrate_chain() to verify offset for your session.

unit_ammo.notes: BattleManager -> SelectedUnit -> UnitData. Valid only during an active battle.

unit_health.notes: BattleManager -> SelectedUnit -> UnitData. Valid only during an active battle.

unit_morale.notes: BattleManager -> SelectedUnit -> UnitData. Valid only during an active battle.

unit_range.description: Selected unit firing range in battle

unit_regeneration.description: Selected unit regeneration / heal tick amount

unit_stamina.notes: BattleManager -> SelectedUnit -> UnitData. Valid only during an active battle.

veterancy_upgrade_cost.description: Cost for unit veterancy / upgrade action

agent_action_write.description: Instruction that writes agent action points
agent_action_write.cheat_action: NOP to stop action point drain after agent actions

agent_training_decrement.description: Instruction that decrements agent training timer
agent_training_decrement.cheat_action: NOP timer decrement and write 0 to complete instantly

ammo_decrement.description: Instruction that decrements ammo — SUB [reg+offset], reg
ammo_decrement.cheat_action: NOP the SUB instruction to prevent ammo consumption

attrition_tick.description: Instruction that applies campaign attrition damage
attrition_tick.cheat_action: NOP attrition damage tick or freeze rate at 0.0

autoresolve_result_write.description: Instruction that writes auto-resolve battle result flag
autoresolve_result_write.cheat_action: Force the player victory flag before battle result finalization

charge_speed_write.description: Instruction that writes cavalry charge speed
charge_speed_write.cheat_action: Redirect to code cave that writes a high speed value

construction_decrement.description: Instruction that decrements construction timer each turn — DEC DWORD PTR [ESI+offset]
construction_decrement.cheat_action: NOP to stop timer decrement; also write 0 to complete instantly

damage_modifier.description: Instruction that scales outgoing combat damage — MULSS XMM1, XMM0 followed by MOVSS [ESI+offset], XMM1
damage_modifier.cheat_action: Redirect to write a very large damage multiplier into the target field

diplomacy_cost_write.description: Instruction that writes diplomatic action cost
diplomacy_cost_write.cheat_action: NOP the cost write and force 0 cost

fog_of_war_check.cheat_action: Bypass fog-of-war visibility check for selected army

health_write.description: Instruction that writes unit health — MOVSS [reg+offset], XMMn
health_write.cheat_action: NOP to prevent health from decreasing

morale_write.description: Instruction that updates unit morale — MOVSS [reg+offset], XMMn
morale_write.cheat_action: NOP to prevent morale updates; combine with writing high morale value

movement_write.description: Instruction that writes movement points — MOVSS [ESI+offset], XMM0
movement_write.cheat_action: NOP to prevent movement point updates

public_order_write.description: Instruction that writes city public order
public_order_write.cheat_action: Freeze public order at a high value

range_modifier.description: Instruction that writes firing range modifier
range_modifier.cheat_action: Write a larger range value into the current weapon stats field

regeneration_tick.description: Instruction that applies unit regeneration or heal tick
regeneration_tick.cheat_action: Freeze a positive regeneration tick for constant healing

reload_timer_write.description: Instruction that writes reload timer for ranged weapons
reload_timer_write.cheat_action: NOP reload timer updates for instant reloading

research_decrement.description: Instruction that decrements research timer each turn — SUB DWORD PTR [ESI+offset], 1
research_decrement.cheat_action: NOP to stop research timer; write 1 for instant completion next turn

research_points_write.description: Instruction that writes research points pool
research_points_write.cheat_action: NOP the write and freeze a large research points value

speed_modifier.description: Instruction that writes unit movement speed — MOVSS [ECX+offset], XMM0
speed_modifier.cheat_action: Write a high speed value; do not NOP or units stop moving

stamina_write.description: Instruction that decreases unit stamina during movement — MOVSS [ESI+offset], XMM2
stamina_write.cheat_action: NOP to prevent stamina drain during battle movement

treasury_write.description: Instruction that writes treasury (gold) value — MOV [ESI+offset], EAX
treasury_write.cheat_action: NOP the write (6 bytes) to prevent the game from updating gold

veterancy_upgrade_cost_write.description: Instruction that writes veterancy / upgrade cost
veterancy_upgrade_cost_write.cheat_action: NOP the upgrade cost write to keep cost at zero

steps: 1. Select an agent on the campaign map
2. Scan for unknown value (Float)
3. Perform an action that spends points
4. Scan for decreased value
5. End turn or rest to refresh points and scan for increased value
6. Freeze at 999.0 for infinite action points
1. Queue agent training or recruitment
2. Note the turns remaining
3. Scan for that exact value (4 Bytes / int32)
4. End turn and scan for decreased value
5. Repeat until the timer address is found
6. Write 0 to complete training immediately
1. Select an army just inside enemy fog of war
2. Scan for unknown initial value (4 Bytes / int32)
3. Move the army into a revealed tile and scan for changed value
4. Move back into fog and scan again
5. Repeat until the visibility flag is isolated
6. Set the flag to 1 to keep the army hidden / fog immune
1. Start a battle with artillery or muskets selected
2. Scan for unknown value (Float)
3. Fire a volley and scan for increased reload timer value
4. Wait for the unit to reload and scan for decreased value
5. Repeat until the timer address remains
6. Freeze at 0.0 for instant reloading
1. Place an army in an attrition-causing location
2. Scan for unknown value (Float)
3. End turn and scan for changed or decreased-value health-related rates
4. Move the army to a safe region and scan for decreased attrition values
5. Repeat until the attrition rate address is isolated
6. Freeze at 0.0 to remove attrition
1. Trigger an auto-resolve preview for a battle
2. Scan for unknown value (4 Bytes / int32)
3. Change the engagement odds by moving armies and scan for changed value
4. Confirm or cancel the preview and scan again
5. Repeat until the winner/result flag address is isolated
6. Write 1 to force a player victory result
1. Select a cavalry unit in battle
2. Scan for unknown value (Float)
3. Order a charge and scan for increased speed-related values
4. Halt the unit and scan for decreased value
5. Repeat until one or two speed values remain
6. Freeze a large value such as 4.0 for a speed boost
1. Begin constructing a building in a settlement
2. Note the number of turns remaining (e.g., 3)
3. Scan for that exact value (4 Bytes / int32)
4. End turn; scan for decreased value (now 2)
5. Repeat until address found
6. Write 0 to complete construction next turn, or 1 to finish in one turn
1. Open a diplomacy action and note its cost
2. Scan for that exact value (4 Bytes / int32)
3. Change to a different treaty or target to alter the cost
4. Scan for changed value
5. Repeat until a stable cost address remains
6. Write 0 to make the diplomatic action free
1. Select an army on the campaign map
2. Scan for unknown value (Float)
3. Move the army a short distance
4. Scan for decreased value
5. End turn (movement points reset to maximum)
6. Scan for increased value
7. Repeat until address found
8. Freeze at a large value (e.g., 999.0) for unlimited movement
1. Open a city details panel and note its public order
2. Scan for that exact value (4 Bytes / int32)
3. End turn or change taxes to modify public order
4. Scan for the new value
5. Repeat until the public order address is found
6. Freeze at 100 to keep order maxed
1. Open the technology panel and note current research points
2. Scan for that exact value (4 Bytes / int32)
3. End turn or trigger research gain
4. Scan for changed or increased value
5. Repeat until the research points pool address is isolated
6. Write a large value such as 9999 and freeze if desired
1. Begin researching a technology
2. Note the turns remaining
3. Scan for that exact value (4 Bytes / int32)
4. End turn; scan for decreased value
5. Repeat until address found
6. Write 1 to complete research on the next turn
1. Note your current gold amount in the campaign UI
2. Scan for that exact value (4 Bytes / int32)
3. Spend some gold (recruit a unit, construct a building)
4. Scan for the new (decreased) value
5. Repeat steps 3-4 until 1-3 addresses remain
6. Change value to desired amount (e.g., 999999)
1. Start a battle and select a ranged unit (e.g., infantry with muskets)
2. Note the ammo count shown in the unit card
3. Scan for that exact value (4 Bytes / int32)
4. Fire a volley to expend some ammo
5. Scan for the new (decreased) value
6. Repeat until the address is found
7. Freeze at the original maximum (e.g., 40 for line infantry)
1. Start a battle and select a unit
2. Note the unit's health percentage (100.0 = full health)
3. Scan for that value as Float
4. Let the unit take damage in battle
5. Scan for decreased value
6. Repeat until 1-3 addresses remain
7. Freeze the address at 100.0 for god mode
1. Start a battle and select a unit
2. Note the morale value (usually 1.0 = full morale)
3. Scan for 1.0 as Float
4. Engage the unit in combat to stress its morale
5. Scan for decreased value
6. Repeat until 1-3 addresses remain
7. Freeze at 2.0 or higher to prevent routing
1. Select a ranged unit in battle and note its firing range
2. Scan for that range value as Float
3. Select a different ranged unit with a different range
4. Scan for changed value
5. Repeat until the range stat address is isolated
6. Write a larger value such as 500.0
1. Start a battle and select a damaged unit
2. Scan for unknown value (Float)
3. Allow the unit to recover or receive healing and scan for increased value
4. Let the unit take more damage and scan for decreased value
5. Repeat until the regeneration tick address is found
6. Freeze a positive regeneration value to keep restoring health
1. Start a battle and select a unit
2. Scan for unknown value (Float)
3. Move the unit several times to drain stamina
4. Scan for decreased value
5. Rest the unit to recover stamina
6. Scan for increased value
7. Repeat until address found
8. Freeze at 1.0 for infinite stamina
1. Open the unit upgrade or veterancy screen
2. Note the displayed upgrade cost
3. Scan for that exact value (4 Bytes / int32)
4. Select another unit or upgrade tier with a different cost
5. Scan for changed value
6. Write 0 to make upgrades free
